title: Public GUI Announcement
description: PGA is a simple, cosmetic mod. It shows the GUI your friends or surrounding people are looking at.
body:
The PGA is a simple, cosmetic mod.
It shows the gui your friends or surrounding people are looking at.

This Mod has to be installed on both server and client to work properly
#### Currently all Vanilla Gui Screens have been implemented.

### To Add mod Support :
Check out the tutorial [here](https://github.com/AbsolemJackdaw/PublicGuiAnnouncement/wiki/Add-Mod-Compatibility)

The mod is young and I'll gladly welcome commentary and suggestions.
### Known Compatible Mods :
- BonsaiPots
- Charging Gadgets
- Custom Selection Box
- Iron Chests
- All In The Quiver
- Mining Gadgets
- RGB Blocks
- Advanced Peripherals
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Vanilla Tweaks (striker rocker)
- Telepads
- Paintings++
- Apple Crates

### Some things to note anyway :

- Ill never add interactable G.U.I screens or alter vanilla screens in any way.
- I will not add drawn content of currently viewing screens (a.k.a chest or inventory contents)

Have some pictures !

![PGA example 1](https://i.imgur.com/6UcegoC.png)
![PGA example 2](https://i.imgur.com/k6xmaaw.png)
![PGA example 3](https://i.imgur.com/7PwVLy8.png)
![PGA example 4](https://i.imgur.com/M61DcQj.png)

#### The new Think Bubble Option !

![PGA Think bubble example](https://i.imgur.com/cp1MD2S.png)

Also try [this think bubble resource pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/public-gui-announcement-icon-set) made by a fan of the mod !

![Think bubble resource pack example](https://imgur.com/hj7Q71Y.png)

visit my discord for questions,reports and/or direct contact !
